narrative: Dollar weakens as US May CPI matches estimates, Pound Sterling rises 0.19% on the news; gold lower -3.65%; equities -1.26%; DXY +0.03%; VIX 21.6. Fed 3.75% vs ECB 2.0% — 175bp carry favors USD, while Fed 3.75% vs BoJ 0.75% — 300bp carry favors USD. Watch ECB Interest Rate Decision at 12:15 UTC.
